Page.Width: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualWidth, FallbackValue=700}
Page.Height: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualHeight, FallbackValue=400}

Run.Text: With our sensors now online, you may notice a
track has been added to our Tactical Display. This is an unidentified radar contact. All unidentified contacts will appear in yellow, and will be marked with a track ID number.

If radar is detecting the contact, it will be marked with an (R) symbol. If we are detecting that contact due to its own radar emissions, we will also see (E), and if we are detecting it visually, we will see (V). Sonar contacts are marked (S).
